claim: No Stable, release, persistence-security, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Breakpoint-exclusive complementary regions contain named nav landmarks, native details groups, and safe real links.
semantics.current: Current location is expressed by aria-current and visible structural state.

interaction.keyboard: Desktop collapse and mobile disclosure use native buttons; mobile Escape and close restore trigger focus.
interaction.routing: Consumers may cancel link events and own navigation.
interaction.touch: The mobile drawer provides explicit controls without gestures.

enhancementIsolation.persistenceOmitted: No adapter read, write, error callback, storage event, UI, attribute, or accessibility output exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Selected and focus states use system colors.
preferences.rtl: Drawer and structural edges follow logical direction.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Persistence adapters are synchronous and consumer-owned; secure storage and cross-tab synchronization are outside core.
